text:
The Shedim are not afraid of us.
There is no power short of Adonai which can hold them.
The Utukku are safe behind the veil.
Their Kings celebrate our suffering in the hidden lands.
The Rabisu know they can feed upon us and live forever.
The Jinn know their power and revel in it.
dusty rocks?
The littlest sound, it is.
Like a tinkle of a bell.
convey more fear in our hearts?
The Shedim are made of smoke and fire and their world is the same.
millennia we fought our primitive fights.
Even now we barely live.
invisible places where we cannot see.
and only then, will the joke finally end.
years in the dirt.
I could tell you of children who followed.
share the anguish and outrage that plagued my soul, but no.
Share my laughter instead.
It is not bitter.
It hides no malice.
laughter can.
Hawwa will speak the word soon, and... you'll see!
heart will fill your throats and you too will be Sara, then.
stars.
Laugh at the dogs in their costumes.
Hah!
phrases were memorized and repeated as we do with scripture today.

Major life transitions can be stressful, scary, or devastating.
Have you experienced one of these major life transitions?
These life transitions are the difficult realities of life  -  change is inevitable and major changes like these rock our world, emotionally and psychologically.
We work hard to achieve success, stability, and security.
Just when we think we've arrived, that things are going well and we have some balance in life, a major life transition can result in emotional turmoil and mental confusion.
Life transitions can be very challenging, and they're often an opportunity for personal growth and development.
Change and major life transitions are inevitable.
Our counseling and therapy staff specialize in supporting and guiding people through these difficult and challenging experiences.

I might just go to sleep tonight dreaming about that curry butter.
I am sad that I have not heard of these delightful butters before, but I will be looking for them!!
I do like a little curry in things...this butter had a particularly good flavor.
What a good idea to use this on refrigerated ravioli!
Can't get them in Minnesota?
Dang it.
I will check out the website.
I have ordered from Dave and Paul's website and the products arrive quickly and make great gifts.
Try the curry butter on steamed green beans; my teenagers love it.
I love compound butter.
And the pancakes really look good!
Lisa, the pancakes are a family favorite...thank you!
They are really good with the maple butter and some fried apples.
Oh, gosh, the oddly orange compound butter sounds marvelous...and perfect for your delicious pancakes!
Happy Easter!
I love REAL butter.
I haven't seen any compound butters in my grocery store but will definitely have to look a little more next time and will have to check out their website!

We are a family run business able to undertake most building and renovation work in Powys, Herefordshire and Worcestershire.
We handle refurbishments and repairs from minor household building repairs, renewing kitchens, bathrooms, installing or upgrading heating systems, roof repairs and general building maintenance.
Our plumbers, electricians and gas engineers are fully qualified and able to work on smaller projects, complete upgrades or new installations.
We can repair both pitched and flat roofs, from a minor repair to a complete rebuild, and of course we can build new roofs onto new properties, extensions or conversions.
Have a look through our website to get an idea of our expertise and browse through the Project Gallery to see some of the projects we have recently worked on.
Feel free to get in touch either through the contact page of this website, by email at  or by phone or to request building work or for an obligation free estimate.

So, Hurricane Irene has decided she doesn't want to go back to school!
The first day of school in my county in Maryland will be cancelled due to the storm damage.
I have never in my life heard of the first day of school being cancelled!
I am so disappointed that I won't see the students tomorrow but I am glad to be able to finish some tasks before the first day.
I will, however, use Hurricane Irene as a teaching opportunity.
Perhaps we will read about hurricanes this week and map each state that was affected by it.
We can create an analogy about how the conditions need to be just right for a hurricane to occur and compare it to how success in the classroom depends on that same type of scenario.
I hope this is all that Mother Nature has in store for this school year as I am sure she has a few snowstorms up her sleeve as well!
Is anyone else off of school tomorrow due to Irene?
Tell us about it by commenting below!
Sorry you are losing the first day.
Here's to a great first Tuesday!

Repairing water damage to your San Quentin property is what we do best.
If you have water damage, San Quentin, California's water damage expert, National Response Team is just a phone call away.
We know that accidents happen.
A faucet was left running.
A pipe burst.
A branch fell on your roof.
Whatever the cause, you're now dealing with unwanted water.
Water damage needs to be controlled immediately to prevent bigger problems down the road.
If you live in San Quentin, the water damage experts at National Response Team will quickly assess the situation and come up with a solid plan to get your property back to normal with quality restoration.
National Response Team offers water damage restoration San Quentin residents have trusted since <hide>.
We will expertly and professionally restore your San Quentin home or office with the highest quality materials available.
<hide>/<hide> emergency restoration service in San Quentin, California.
When you have water damage in your San Quentin property, call (<hide>) <hide>-<hide> for quality restoration services.

Each year, we hold a fantastic Summer School programme available for all our Year <hide> students that are due to start with us in September of the new academic year.
The Summer programme lasts for the first week of the summer holidays.
Students will be able to participate in <hide> workshops which are cross curricular and fun.
So whatever your interests there will be something for you!!
Many parents would expect a breakfast club to provide a safe environment where students can have something to eat and socialise with their friends.
The academy offers this and a little extra, with active activities should students which to participate.
We are aware that when students arrive earlier to school they can socialise and such active sessions will help students to be ready to learn from the second they step into the classroom.
The club runs daily from <hide>:<hide>am to <hide>:<hide>am.
We are in the process of applying for the Breakfast Club Plus Award.
The academy offers a wide menu of activities for students both before and after school and during the forthcoming summer holidays.
Details can be found below and in our Extra Curricular Activities programme (see our DOWNLOADS and NEWSLETTERS page).

[U.S.A.], June <hide> (ANI): Olympian skier Bode Miller is mourning the tragic death of his <hide>-month-old daughter Emeline Grier Miller.
Miller shared the news on his Instagram account on Tuesday, which left his friends and well-wishers in a state of shock.
As reported by the USA Today, the cause of the toddler's untimely death is drowning in a residential pool.
The American alpine ski racer wrote, "We are beyond devastated.
Our baby girl, Emmy, passed away yesterday.
Never in a million years did we think we would experience a pain like this.
Her love, her light, her spirit will never be forgotten.
Our little girl loved life and lived it to it's fullest everyday.
Our family respectfully requests privacy during this painful time."
The post was also shared on Morgan's (Bode's wife) Insta page.
Miller and Morgan, a model and professional beach voleyball player, married in <hide> after dating for some time.
The couple had two kids together, a <hide>-year-old son, Edward Nash Skan Miller, and late baby Emeline Grier.
They had revealed on Easter Sunday, i.e.
April <hide> of <hide>, that a new baby is expected in October.
